fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.defaultValue: We use cookies to ensure the website works properly, understand how it’s used, and remember your preferences. We do not use cookies for advertising, cross-site tracking, or profiling.

fields.name: essentialDescription
fields.label: Essential Cookies Description (Dropdown)
fields.defaultValue: These cookies are necessary for the website to function correctly. They support security, session management, and storing your cookie consent choice.

fields.name: analyticsDescription
fields.label: Analytics Cookies Description (Dropdown)
fields.defaultValue: Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

fields.name: preferenceDescription
fields.label: Preference Cookies Description (Dropdown)
fields.defaultValue: Preference cookies allow the website to remember choices you make, such as language or region, to provide a more personalized experience.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Section Content
fields.defaultValue:
GMR Airports Limited (operating as GMR AERO) runs Asia’s largest private airport network and the world’s second largest. GMR serves over 120 million passengers annually across a growing network, with operations spanning India, Indonesia, Greece, and the Philippines.

Our portfolio includes airports in Delhi, Hyderabad, Goa, Kualanamu (Indonesia), and technical services at Cebu (Philippines), which makes us the only Indian airport developer with projects abroad. GMR AERO’s network and integrated airport solutions extend to 310 destinations, with support from a partnership with Groupe ADP. Numerous awards from ACI and Skytrax are testimony to GMR Group’s world-class airport management services.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Section Content
fields.defaultValue: GMR Group is a leading Global infrastructure conglomerate with interests in Airports, Energy, Transportation and Urban Infrastructure.
